summary: Strong encore with a standout Foolish Heart performance; recording source not specified
review: Both reviewers praise the show’s closing Foolish Heart, noting solid playing from Jerry and an uplifting contribution by Brent on keys. No comments are made about the audio source or fidelity, so the technical quality remains unclear, but the musical moment is highlighted as a high point of an otherwise fine concert.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews focus on the Foolish Heart performance, indicating a very good show; lack of recording details limits confidence and suggests only average technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention sound clarity, mix, or any audio issues, leaving the recording quality indeterminate.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Encore highlighted by Foolish Heart, which reviewers describe as a strong and satisfying close to an otherwise fine show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Jerry's playing is described as fine.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent adds extra lift to the performance.
